allow:
Bash(git -C /Users/rezzeh/Projects/german-data-job-analyzer commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add NER training script for xlm-roberta-large fine-tuning

Token classification on IOB-tagged job posting data to extract
SKILL and TOOL entities, with MPS/CUDA/CPU auto-detection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
from datasets import Dataset, load_from_disk
from pathlib import Path

DATASET_DIR = Path\('data/processed/ner_dataset'\)
raw_ds = load_from_disk\(str\(DATASET_DIR\)\)

# Mimic prepare_spanmarker_split for one example
example = raw_ds['test'][0]
tokens = example['tokens']
ner_tags = example['ner_tags']

# Reconstruct words
words = []
word_tags = []
current_pieces, current_tag = [], None
for token, tag in zip\(tokens, ner_tags\):
    if tag == -100:
        continue
    surface = token.lstrip\('\\u2581'\)
    if token.startswith\('\\u2581'\) or not current_pieces:
        if current_pieces:
            words.append\(''.join\(current_pieces\)\)
            word_tags.append\(current_tag\)
        current_pieces = [surface]
        current_tag = tag
    else:
        current_pieces.append\(surface\)
if current_pieces:
    words.append\(''.join\(current_pieces\)\)
    word_tags.append\(current_tag\)

# Check what Dataset.from_dict returns
ds = Dataset.from_dict\({'tokens': [words], 'ner_tags': [word_tags]}\)
col = ds['tokens']
print\('type of col:', type\(col\)\)
print\('type of col[0]:', type\(col[0]\)\)
if col[0]:
    print\('type of col[0][0]:', type\(col[0][0]\)\)
    print\('isinstance str:', isinstance\(col[0][0], str\)\)
    print\('value:', repr\(col[0][0]\)\)
print\('words sample:', words[:3]\)
print\('type words[0]:', type\(words[0]\)\)
" 2>&1)
